title: The Gathering of Byzantine Forces against the Muslims and the Muslims' Call for Aid from the Kufans
description: Muslims and the Muslims' Call for Aid from the Kufans In this year, according to Abu Mikhnaf, the Byzantines mobilized their forces to such a level that the Muslim armies in Syria sought reinforcements from 'Uthman. The Account of That Event According to Hishim-Abu Mikhnaf-Farwah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
